tracks.meaning: the amount of space occupied by a three-dimensional object, typically measured in cubic units
the loudness or intensity of sound
the amount of sales, output, or activity in a commercial enterprise
the capacity or amount of material that can be contained in a container or space
a book or set of books, especially one that is part of a larger work or series
the amount of air that can be breathed in and out of the lungs
the quantity of a drug or medication administered to a patient
the amount of data storage or data transfer capacity available in a system
the number of shares or securities traded in a market during a specific period
the quantity of rock or earth material in a given area or formation
a large quantity or amount of something
to adjust the loudness level of an audio device or system
